title: DarkShields
description: A dark, minimalist shield with subtle details, keeping the classic vanilla style.
body:
![DarkShields](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecccc68e108ed78a2606862c86ae7149c4432bb5_0.webp)
DarkShields is a minimalist Minecraft resource pack that replaces vanilla shield textures with dark, clean, and consistent designs.
The pack is focused on simplicity and clarity, keeping a vanilla-friendly style while improving the overall look of shields.
DarkShields works great for PvP, survival gameplay, and dark-themed builds, offering a modern and serious aesthetic without unnecessary details.

![Shield Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31cd2f14c64575bccbfac7284bda9f6c4b25d0af.png)
